headline: The $7 Trillion AI Boom Is Running Out of Power
summary: Bitzero just signed a binding letter for a 15-year, 110MW lease with OneQode to be backed by an IG counterparty worth $2.6 billion, validating the bitcoin-miner-turned-AI-landlord thesis.
